Off Calendar Jun-17-2010 Judgment Entered

SMALL CLAIMS - CLAIM - TRIAL COURT CALENDAR
Off Calendar Jun-18-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Regular Small Claims Court Trial
Appearances: Mr. Daniel Balsam- Plaintiff
Mr. Simon Chernin, for defendant Bloosky Interactive, LLC

Ruling: Argued and the court took the matter under submission. Plaintiff presents the following copy as evidences; Exh. "A"- E-mail dated 2/29/09. Exh. "B"-Demand Letter dated March 19, 2009. Defendant likewise presents to Court e-mail communications between him and plaintiff. Both parties in open court reference materials for the judge to review. Parties indicated that materials and exhibits submitted is for the court to keep and they don't need it back. Judge R. Quidachay, Clerk R. Pascual. DEPT. 501. NOT REPORTED.
